analysis.reasoning: Core message: Russia, via MFA spokesperson Zakharova, states it has no intention to send troops to Afghanistan, while highlighting expanded cooperation with Afghanistan on counterterrorism, anti-drug efforts, military-technical collaboration, and training specialists. Evaluation: RU1 (West immoral/hostile): Not referenced; no mention of the West or its morality. RU2 (Russia leads an alternative system): Implicit multilateralism is present, but the tweet does not frame this as an alternative to Western systems or emphasize a broader non-Western order; thus not clearly supported. RU3 (Russia is a benevolent partner): Yes. The tweet portrays Russia as a responsible, non-interventionist actor aiding Afghanistan through cooperation and capacity-building against common threats, fitting the benevolent partner framing. RU4 (Russian history admirable): Not applicable. RU5 (Russia at the world’s forefront): No claims of superiority or showcasing achievements. RU6 (Culture/nature/heritage): Not applicable. Conclusion: The tweet promotes RU3.
